root_text.an10.106:1.4: ye ca micchādiṭṭhipaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti te cassa nijjiṇṇā honti;
root_text.an10.106:1.5: sammādiṭṭhipaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchanti.
root_text.an10.106:2.2: ye ca micchāsaṅkappapaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti te cassa nijjiṇṇā honti;
root_text.an10.106:2.3: sammāsaṅkappapaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchanti.
root_text.an10.106:3.2: ye ca micchāvācāpaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti te cassa nijjiṇṇā honti;
root_text.an10.106:3.3: sammāvācāpaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchanti.
root_text.an10.106:4.2: ye ca micchākammantapaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti te cassa nijjiṇṇā honti;
root_text.an10.106:4.3: sammākammantapaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchanti.
root_text.an10.106:5.2: ye ca micchāājīvapaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti te cassa nijjiṇṇā honti;
root_text.an10.106:5.3: sammāājīvapaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchanti.
root_text.an10.106:6.2: ye ca micchāvāyāmapaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti te cassa nijjiṇṇā honti;
root_text.an10.106:6.3: sammāvāyāmapaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchanti.
root_text.an10.106:7.2: ye ca micchāsatipaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti te cassa nijjiṇṇā honti;
root_text.an10.106:7.3: sammāsatipaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchanti.
root_text.an10.106:8.2: ye ca micchāsamādhipaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti te cassa nijjiṇṇā honti;
root_text.an10.106:8.3: sammāsamādhipaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchanti.
root_text.an10.106:9.2: ye ca micchāñāṇapaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti te cassa nijjiṇṇā honti;
root_text.an10.106:9.3: sammāñāṇapaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchanti.
root_text.an10.106:10.2: ye ca micchāvimuttipaccayā aneke pāpakā akusalā dhammā sambhavanti te cassa nijjiṇṇā honti;
root_text.an10.106:10.3: sammāvimuttipaccayā ca aneke kusalā dhammā bhāvanāpāripūriṁ gacchanti.

translation_text.an10.106:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these ten grounds for wearing away.
translation_text.an10.106:1.3: For one of right view, wrong view is worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:1.4: And the many bad, unskillful qualities that arise because of wrong view are worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:1.5: And because of right view, many skillful qualities are fully developed.
translation_text.an10.106:2.1: For one of right thought, wrong thought is worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:2.2: And the many bad, unskillful qualities that arise because of wrong thought are worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:2.3: And because of right thought, many skillful qualities are fully developed.
translation_text.an10.106:3.1: For one of right speech, wrong speech is worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:3.2: And the many bad, unskillful qualities that arise because of wrong speech are worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:3.3: And because of right speech, many skillful qualities are fully developed.
translation_text.an10.106:4.1: For one of right action, wrong action is worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:4.2: And the many bad, unskillful qualities that arise because of wrong action are worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:4.3: And because of right action, many skillful qualities are fully developed.
translation_text.an10.106:5.1: For one of right livelihood, wrong livelihood is worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:5.2: And the many bad, unskillful qualities that arise because of wrong livelihood are worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:5.3: And because of right livelihood, many skillful qualities are fully developed.
translation_text.an10.106:6.1: For one of right effort, wrong effort is worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:6.2: And the many bad, unskillful qualities that arise because of wrong effort are worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:6.3: And because of right effort, many skillful qualities are fully developed.
translation_text.an10.106:7.1: For one of right mindfulness, wrong mindfulness is worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:7.2: And the many bad, unskillful qualities that arise because of wrong mindfulness are worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:7.3: And because of right mindfulness, many skillful qualities are fully developed.
translation_text.an10.106:8.1: For one of right immersion, wrong immersion is worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:8.2: And the many bad, unskillful qualities that arise because of wrong immersion are worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:8.3: And because of right immersion, many skillful qualities are fully developed.
translation_text.an10.106:9.1: For one of right knowledge, wrong knowledge is worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:9.2: And the many bad, unskillful qualities that arise because of wrong knowledge are worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:9.3: And because of right knowledge, many skillful qualities are fully developed.
translation_text.an10.106:10.1: For one of right freedom, wrong freedom is worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:10.2: And the many bad, unskillful qualities that arise because of wrong freedom are worn away.
translation_text.an10.106:10.3: And because of right freedom, many skillful qualities are fully developed.
translation_text.an10.106:11.1: These are the ten grounds for wearing away.”
